description_long: This is a large, modern, stainless steel refrigerator with a double-door design on the upper section and four pull-out drawers on the lower section. The front features prominent vertical handles and a built-in water and ice dispenser on the right door, with several open compartments visible. The exterior is sleek and metallic, with a brushed finish that reflects light subtly. The top section has a horizontal grille, likely for ventilation, and the overall form is boxy and robust. The sides and back are plain, smooth, and metallic, with no visible features except for the subtle curvature at the top. This refrigerator is typical of high-end kitchen appliances and would be found in residential or commercial urban environments.
description: A large, stainless steel double-door refrigerator with four lower drawers, a water/ice dispenser, and a sleek, modern finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing double doors, four lower drawers, vertical handles, and a water/ice dispenser.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a smooth, metallic surface with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, flat metallic back with a slight top curvature.
description_view_3: Right side view with a smooth, featureless metallic surface similar to the left side.
attribute_door_handle_style: Protruding vertical bar handles, placed on the front doors and drawers, metallic and cylindrical.
attribute_vent_or_grille_pattern: Horizontal slats located at the top front section.
